svg.title: File service architecture diagram
svg.desc: Layered architecture showing Client → API Gateway → Services → Redis → BullMQ → Workers → Persistence

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What clients connect to this API?')
sendPrompt('How does the API Gateway handle authentication and routing?')
g.text: JWT Auth · Rate Limiting · Request Routing

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Upload Service do with dedup and quota?')
sendPrompt('How do signed URLs work in the File Service?')
sendPrompt('How does the Metadata Service handle versioning and search?')
sendPrompt('How does Redis serve both metadata cache and BullMQ?')
sendPrompt('How does BullMQ handle priority lanes and retries?')
sendPrompt('How does the Scan Worker use ClamAV?')
sendPrompt('How does the Thumbnail Worker convert to WebP using sharp?')
sendPrompt('What does the Process Worker orchestrate?')
sendPrompt('What does PostgreSQL store in this system?')
sendPrompt('What does Redis store for cache and queues in persistence?')
sendPrompt('How does S3/MinIO store blobs, thumbnails, and chunks?')
